name: Baked Bananas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bananas in half lengthwise and place cut side down in a buttered baking dish.
2. Brush bananas with lemon juice.
3. Sprinkle with grated lemon zest and brown sugar.
4. Drizzle with melted butter.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes.
6. Serve warm as a side dish with meat or as a dessert plain or with ice cream.
If using brown sugar substitute, this recipe can be used as a diabetic-friendly option. You may also use less margarine for further reduction in fat content.
